horoscope: Watch for exaggeration and for attempts to score intellectual points today, dear Aries, which may come at a price. Big ideas are exciting now, but because you're not yet in the frame of mind to see what's genuinely doable, it's best to save fleshing out details for a more organized, cautious time. You might decide to enjoy the mental exercise of thinking up possibilities without banking on them just yet for the best results now. Watch for overlooking details today, though, for your more demanding or mundane endeavors. Fortunately, today's Venus-Neptune transit encourages understanding. It's a time when the sentimental and gentle side of your nature emerges, and others appreciate it as you own and express it. Venus is in your communications sector, suggesting that benefits are likely to arise now through learning, connecting, communicating, and giving things further thought. Your communications and gestures are soothing, healing, and attractive.

Today's energies are good for positive thinking, dear Taurus, but the details may not get their due attention. There's a tendency for people to make mountains out of molehills at times today. Still, it's not necessarily a waste of time — it may very well lead to exciting ideas and possibilities. However, it's best to reserve judgment or adopt a wait-and-see approach. The tendency is to make mistakes when judging things, mainly due to optimism. Fortunately, you have a Venus-Neptune transit in play that boosts your imagination and puts you in fine shape for forgiveness, resting, and releasing stress. Giving out the kind of approval and affection you'd like to receive is a good idea now, since energies are good for promoting peace and harmony. This can also be a fine time for intuiting new ideas about handling your finances, although comfort objects can be more appealing than usual! You might enjoy going with the flow and accepting things as they are today, which comes as a nice break from current pressures.

Take time to catch your breath today, dear Gemini. It's particularly appropriate to wind down rather than wind yourself up today. You prefer to let your thoughts roam more freely today, and you can be considering fantastic ideas or dreaming up ways to pursue long-term happiness. It's best not to run with them just yet, as impracticality is likely with a Mercury-Jupiter square in play. Watch for going overboard, but aim to enjoy the mental exercise involved with thinking in big terms. Today's Venus-Neptune transit tunes you into the subtle or otherworldly elements of life, and your understanding of others, yourself, and your purpose skyrockets as a result. The key is to avoid pushing things. Offering sincere and mindful advice, being a source of comfort, and inspiring others with your insight can figure strongly now. The spirit of friendship dominates. It's incredibly satisfying to put others' needs before yours today.

There is some tendency to overdo, and especially, to say too much today, dear Cancer. Try to leave your ego at the door when entering into professional arenas or in more formal settings. With Mercury at the top of your solar chart, you have more impact than usual, and today's energies suggest some miscalculations. Avoid sudden, impulsive decisions for the best results. However, this can also be a time for stretching your mind to consider new possibilities. You are thinking far ahead and in bigger terms than usual now. It's essential to simplify as you can be juggling far too much right now. Career matters are a little complicated, but also quite fresh and exciting. As well, today's Venus-Neptune transit can boost your appeal, or you could come to a compassionate understanding of matters that have previously frustrated you. In some areas of your life, it may be time to let go of anger so you can move forward. Some matters are working in mysterious but magical ways for you. Drawing on past ideas can be successful.

You can be excited about sharing your thoughts, ideas, or beliefs today, dear Leo, and they can be very inspiring, but be careful to listen to others as well. As well, watch for those who are boasting or exaggerating, as the truth can be stretched too easily today. However, all ideas entertained now are not write-offs. In fact, you can come up with something very special today that will need fine-tuning later. Real opportunities are coming your way, and they're likely to be related to creative, publishing, travel, or educational channels. Today's harmonious aspect between Venus and Neptune helps smooth things over, in fact. Forgiveness and grace are pushing up and out. You may want to take a chance on love and friendship with a kind gesture or expression. Imagination heightens, and you might find inspiration through friends and non-routine experiences. This transit can help boost your mood and inspire you to greater heights. Instead, you might prefer to use this smooth energy to relax and unwind, as it's terrific for releasing tension. Whether relationships are currently challenging or happy, they stand to improve in subtle ways today.

Today's transits inspire you to consider ways to improve, enhance, and enjoy your relationships, dear Virgo. However, there is a tendency today to make mountains out of molehills, as incoming information may be overblown. There is no need to jump into something, even if it feels that way. Aim to reserve judgment. Find ways to know yourself and important people in your life more deeply, but watch for missing important, practical details or focusing on things that don't truly matter in the long run to the detriment of your happiness. Fortunately, today's Venus-Neptune aspect encourages you to see the beauty in the ordinary. It can be a time of self-discovery or the subtle and pleasant development of a close relationship. You are in a position to see matters in a compassionate light, more so than usual. There can be a visionary quality to your goals as you cook up and imagine new ways of making things happen. You might engage an audience, group, or person with this aspect occurring in your intimacy and public sectors. Gaining some release from pressure feels wonderful right now. Opportunities to find the silver lining can emerge. Small advances and subtle moves are in favor right now.

Watch that you don't burn out by attempting too much or by setting over-the-top goals for yourself today, dear Libra. It's best to avoid rushing through your work or conversations, as it's easy to overlook something critical as Mercury and Jupiter clash. Judgment may be off just for now. While you can enjoy more mental freedom, you may also find it harder to lock something down. It’s best not to make promises or put your faith into others’ proclamations just for now. However, today's Venus-Neptune transit helps you release tension and smooth things over. You're attracted to easygoing pleasure, and there can be an almost psychic rapport with someone significant in your life. Attraction today comes through gentleness and warmth. Compassion and understanding are more abundant, and a healthy dose can help boost a connection. It's also an excellent time to explore a new interest or topic. Today's energies connect your partnership zone with your sector of beliefs, vision, and discovery in a pleasing way. Love matters can thrive as you open your heart or share perspectives.

It's easy to wind yourself up on a mental level today, dear Scorpio. It's not inherently a bad thing, as some great ideas can come out of this kind of tension. As well, entertaining big ideas can stretch the mind. However, it's up to you to keep this moderate when appropriate. Ideas about how to handle chores, work, or health endeavors can be particularly exciting. There could be innovative ways to address a health or mechanical problem coming your way now, and the trick will be to focus long enough to build a realistic plan. Do keep in mind that there can be some misleading talk or false leads today, but enjoy new ideas that excite and motivate you now. Today's Venus-Neptune transit favors letting mysteries unravel at their own pace instead of attempting to rush things. Your intuition for work, health, and research or analysis is growing. This transit can help inspire a love for your routine or work, and encourage you to bring more imagination to your daily affairs. You might find spots of time for unwinding and enjoying yourself.

There can be a tendency to exaggerate today that needs taming, dear Sagittarius. You might jump on a new idea and, in your excitement, forget the practical details required for its realization. Otherwise, listen to your creative ideas and inspirations, even if they seem a little way-out. Stretch your mind while keeping your feet on the ground. Great ideas usually go through many transformations before reaching their potential. Fortunately, you are more intuitive about people and especially sensitive to their feelings with a Venus-Neptune transit in play. A gentle approach brings rewards. It's also an excellent time to create, write, make art or music, or appreciate and enjoy original art, theater, writing, and music. You might recognize and appreciate things about someone that you may have previously overlooked. The energy of this transit is subtle but warm, boosting your imagination and need for pleasantness. You might choose to let go of negative thoughts.

There could be a lot of talk that is impractical or exaggerated in spots today, dear Capricorn. It may be a helpful exercise to think in big ways, especially if you previously missed an opportunity by focusing mainly on practical possibilities. Ideas are big and easy to come by, but they're hard to bring home! The problem is that there are so many things to consider that it can be hard to know where to begin. This is the energy of a Mercury-Jupiter square coloring today. The pace may be hectic, and your domestic life may be awhirl, although for some of you, this can all take place in the mind, and nervous tension is possible. Fortunately, today's Venus-Neptune influence encourages you to let things flow naturally rather than push in certain areas of your life. Connections enhance, and you might enjoy some form of psychic rapport or communication with someone special. It's a good time to promote peace and balance. Offering your help or services can be more satisfying than usual. Wonderful energy is with you for getting in touch with your inner needs, sense of belonging and safety, and family or home matters.

It's important to keep a check on your communications today, dear Aquarius, as you are inclined to speak too much and/or too soon. You may be campaigning for a good cause now, but the message may be a little over the top or perceived as such, and plans may not come together just yet. Mental restlessness can lead to positive experiences, particularly if it compels you to seek out new and interesting information or interests. Discipline, however, can be lacking if you are required to focus on dry or monotonous work. Fortunately, you're finding opportunities to express yourself in new ways today. A Venus-Neptune transit can highlight your ability to soothe and heal through your communications. As well, your perceptions heighten, allowing you to understand others on a whole new level. You might inspire others with your words or enjoy some personal interests and projects that intrigue and motivate you. Or, some release from stress today is most welcome.

You could come up with a truly visionary idea today, dear Pisces, or you could be thinking too big! There may be a war of words about personal possessions, value, intimacy, and respect for some of you. Instead, this can be a day when the ordinary doesn't satisfy, which can lead to interesting thinking. While you could be unproductive right now as you focus on the less essential things, you tend to see the hidden layers of a situation. Today's Venus-Neptune transit encourages compassion and taking more time to unwind. Helping someone out can be particularly rewarding with this transit. Bringing more imagination, vision, creativity, warmth, generosity, and compassion to the equation can be magical now. Circumstances may be such that spiritual support is appreciated and needed.
